message: 🌱 Add keylime: IMA scalability is currently limited mission (#457)

+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Identify keylime feature symptoms",
+        "description": "Check for the issue in your keylime deployment:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n cert-manager -l app=keylime\nkubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=keylime -n cert-manager --tail=100 | grep -i error\n```\nLook for errors related to: IMA scalability is currently limited"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Check current resource configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant keylime resources:\n```bash\nkubectl get resource -A\nkubectl describe resource <name> -n <namespace>\n```\nWhile running scaling experiments in our virtual cluster, we have detected multiple serious problems with the current IMA implementation. We are planning to describe the general problem here, then iss"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for IMA scalability is currently limited",
+        "description": "…t table\n\nImplement an AllowlistDBProxy that acts as a proxy and cache to the\nallowlists DB table by holding the VerifierAllowlist DB entries in\na map whose keys are the IDs of the allowlists. Whenever one needs a\nVerfierAllowlist DB entry one queries a AllowlistDBProxy singleton for an\nentry with that allowlist ID. If the entry is not currently cached in\nthe map it will be loaded from the DB and otherwise every few seconds the\ncurrently cached entry will be checked for an update and the latest \n\nSee the fix PR for details: linked PR"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Upgrade keylime to include the fix",
+        "description": "If the fix is included in a newer release, upgrade keylime:\n```bash\nhelm repo update\nhelm upgrade keylime jetstack/keylime --namespace cert-manager\n```\nVerify the upgrade:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n cert-manager\nhelm list -n cert-manager\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Confirm IMA scalability is currently limited is resolved",
+        "description": "Verify the fix by checking that the original error no longer occurs:\n```bash\nkubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=keylime -n cert-manager --tail=50 --since=5m\nkubectl get events -n cert-manager --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm that the issue symptoms are gone."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "The root cause is: …t table\n\nImplement an AllowlistDBProxy that acts as a proxy and cache to the\nallowlists DB table by holding the VerifierAllowlist DB entries in\na map whose keys are the IDs of the allowlists. Whenever one needs a\nVerfierAllowlist DB entry one queries a AllowlistDBProxy singleton for an\nentry with that allowlist ID. If the entry is not currently cached in\nthe map it will be loaded from the DB and . This fixes the issue because it addresses the underlying problem that was causing the failure.",
